'''zhothakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphicidal|nymphicidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphicidal|nymphicidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhothakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhothakithi|zhothakithi]] || [[word:zhothakiji|zhothakiji]] || [[word:zhothakishi|zhothakishi]] || [[word:zhothakiki|zhothakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhothakuthuthu|zhothakuthuthu]] || [[word:zhothakujuju|zhothakujuju]] || [[word:zhothakushushu|zhothakushushu]] || [[word:zhothakukuku|zhothakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhothakuthu|zhothakuthu]] || [[word:zhothakuju|zhothakuju]] || [[word:zhothakushu|zhothakushu]] || [[word:zhothakuku|zhothakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhothakufthuf|zhothakufthuf]] || [[word:zhothakufjuf|zhothakufjuf]] || [[word:zhothakufshuf|zhothakufshuf]] || [[word:zhothakufkuf|zhothakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhothakethe|zhothakethe]] || [[word:zhothakeje|zhothakeje]] || [[word:zhothakeshe|zhothakeshe]] || [[word:zhothakeke|zhothakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhothakothotho|zhothakothotho]] || [[word:zhothakojojo|zhothakojojo]] || [[word:zhothakoshosho|zhothakoshosho]] || [[word:zhothakokoko|zhothakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhothakotho|zhothakotho]] || [[word:zhothakojo|zhothakojo]] || [[word:zhothakosho|zhothakosho]] || [[word:zhothakoko|zhothakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhothakofthof|zhothakofthof]] || [[word:zhothakofjof|zhothakofjof]] || [[word:zhothakofshof|zhothakofshof]] || [[word:zhothakofkof|zhothakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhothakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhothakĂŠthĂŠ|zhothakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhothakĂŠjĂŠ|zhothakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhothakĂŠshĂŠ|zhothakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhothakĂŠkĂŠ|zhothakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhothakathatha|zhothakathatha]] || [[word:zhothakajaja|zhothakajaja]] || [[word:zhothakashasha|zhothakashasha]] || [[word:zhothakakaka|zhothakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhothakatha|zhothakatha]] || [[word:zhothakaja|zhothakaja]] || [[word:zhothakasha|zhothakasha]] || [[word:zhothakaka|zhothakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhothakafthaf|zhothakafthaf]] || [[word:zhothakafjaf|zhothakafjaf]] || [[word:zhothakafshaf|zhothakafshaf]] || [[word:zhothakafkaf|zhothakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhothakasha|zhothakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhothakshĂ«sha|zhothakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhothakrosha|zhothakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhothakmusha|zhothakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhothakyasha|zhothakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhothaknkshĂ«sha|gozhothaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhothaknkrosha|gozhothaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhothaknkmusha|gozhothaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhothaknkyasha|gozhothaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhothathakasha|zhothathakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhothathakshĂ«sha|zhothathakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhothathakrosha|zhothathakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhothathakmusha|zhothathakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhothathakyasha|zhothathakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhothathaknkshĂ«sha|gozhothathaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhothathaknkrosha|gozhothathaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhothathaknkmusha|gozhothathaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhothathaknkyasha|gozhothathaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhethĂŠkasha|zhethĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhethĂŠkshĂ«sha|zhethĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhethĂŠkrosha|zhethĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhethĂŠkmusha|zhethĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhethĂŠkyasha|zhethĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhethĂŠknkshĂ«sha|gozhethĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhethĂŠknkrosha|gozhethĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhethĂŠknkmusha|gozhethĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhethĂŠknkyasha|gozhethĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhothfakasha|zhothfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhothfakshĂ«sha|zhothfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhothfakrosha|zhothfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhothfakmusha|zhothfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhothfakyasha|zhothfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhothfaknkshĂ«sha|gozhothfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhothfaknkrosha|gozhothfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhothfaknkmusha|gozhothfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhothfaknkyasha|gozhothfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
